title: rinorea bicornuta
intro: Rinorea bicornuta is a plant species native to tropical Africa, commonly known as the two-horned Rinorea. It is a medicinal plant with properties that can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever. Herbal preparations of Rinorea bicornuta are typically made by boiling the leaves and roots in water, then consuming the resulting tea or applying the solution topically to affected areas.
